rationale: No qualitative change from Poland's perspective — Iran deal remains unresolved, Ukraine war continues as background, EU migration debate is a mild indirect signal.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal keeps oil/gas price risk elevated for Poland. No resolution means energy cost relief remains elusive.

top_events.title: Ukraine keeps targeting Russian energy infrastructure
top_events.summary: Ukraine strikes Russian energy terminals — continuation of war dynamics, no qualitative escalation affecting Poland directly, but signals ongoing conflict intensity near eastern border.

top_events.title: EU migration debate intensifies — rallies in Rome, new EU rules discussed
top_events.summary: Ongoing EU-wide migration policy debate has mild indirect relevance for Poland given its own border pressures and EU policy alignment.
